name: BOUNCE
description: Bouncing ball physics simulation with gravity and ground collision

realParameters.description: Packed physics parameters: masses, radii, walls, gravity

integerParameters.description: Number of balls and simulation mode

xmlExample:
<BasicBlock id="b1" parent="0:2:0" interfaceFunctionName="BOUNCE" blockType="c" dependsOnU="0" dependsOnT="1" simulationFunctionName="bounce_ball" simulationFunctionType="C_OR_FORTRAN" style="BOUNCE">
  <ScilabString as="exprs" height="7" width="1">
    <data line="0" column="0" value="[1;1]"/>
    <data line="1" column="0" value="[1;1]"/>
    <data line="2" column="0" value="[0;5;0;5]"/>
    <data line="3" column="0" value="[2;2.5]"/>
    <data line="4" column="0" value="[0;0]"/>
    <data line="5" column="0" value="[3;5]"/>
    <data line="6" column="0" value="[0;0]"/>
  </ScilabString>
  <ScilabDouble as="realParameters" height="1" width="10">
    <data line="0" column="0" realPart="1.0"/>
    <data line="0" column="1" realPart="1.0"/>
    <data line="0" column="2" realPart="1.0"/>
    <data line="0" column="3" realPart="1.0"/>
    <data line="0" column="4" realPart="0.0"/>
    <data line="0" column="5" realPart="5.0"/>
    <data line="0" column="6" realPart="0.0"/>
    <data line="0" column="7" realPart="5.0"/>
    <data line="0" column="8" realPart="9.81"/>
    <data line="0" column="9" realPart="0.0"/>
  </ScilabDouble>
  <mxGeometry as="geometry" x="300.0" y="200.0" width="60.0" height="40.0"/>
</BasicBlock>
anomalies: No input ports - generates positions autonomously
State vector of dimension 8 tracks positions and velocities
criticalRules: Zero-crossing surfaces detect ball-wall and ball-ball collisions
Position output is [2x1] for multiple balls
